details.attacks: 1 x attack (1d6+4 by fist or weapon)

Throw Hurl Rocks: When in combat, they can throw rocks that deal 2d10+5 damage, They can do so two times per day. system.description:
Beasthead giants are the most brutal of all the giant sub-types, with animal-like features that betray their savage nature.
